dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: Behold, my master does not know what is in the house with me, and he has put everything that he has in my charge

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: He is not greater in this house than I, and he has withheld nothing from me except you, because you are his wife. How then could I do this great evil and sin against God?

dialogue.speaker: potiphars-wife
dialogue.englishText: See, he has brought to us a Hebrew man to laugh at us; he came in to me to lie with me, and I cried out with a loud voice

dialogue.speaker: potiphars-wife
dialogue.englishText: And when he heard that I raised my voice and cried out, he left his garment with me and fled and went outside

dialogue.speaker: potiphars-wife
dialogue.englishText: The Hebrew servant whom you brought to us came in to me to laugh at me

dialogue.speaker: potiphars-wife
dialogue.englishText: And as I raised my voice and cried out, he left his garment with me and fled outside
